tools.name: calculate_statistics
tools.description:
Calculate descriptive statistics for a list of numbers.
    Returns: {mean, median, std_dev, min, max, sum, count, percentiles}

tools.name: calculate_irr
tools.description:
Calculate Internal Rate of Return (IRR) for cashflows.
    cashflows: [initial_investment (negative), cf1, cf2, ...] Returns: {irr_percent}

tools.name: calculate_npv
tools.description:
Calculate Net Present Value. rate: discount rate as decimal (e.g. 0.1 = 10%).
    Returns: {npv, rate_percent, cashflows_count}

tools.name: convert_units
tools.description:
Convert between units. Supports: length, weight, temperature, area, volume.
    Returns: {result, from_unit, to_unit, formula}

tools.name: get_exchange_rates
tools.description:
Get current exchange rates from NBU (Ukraine National Bank) — no API key needed.
    Returns: {rates, base, date, source}
